DESCRIPTION

A clear summary of the bug.


STEPS TO REPRODUCE

1. Install the package
2. Set up a palette with ...
3. Trigger ...
4. See the error


EXPECTED BEHAVIOR

What you expected to happen.


ACTUAL BEHAVIOR

What actually happened. Include console errors or screenshots if relevant.


ENVIRONMENT

- Browser and version
- Extension manifest version (V2 or V3)
- Package version
- OS
